architectReview.evidence: Architect review cleared the continuation slice after the final restore fail-closed delta and found no remaining blocker in the public contract surfaces under review.

executorQa.evidence: Leader-ran full repository verification, full pyflakes, docs/evidence JSON validation, runtime MCP discovery, and CLI smoke all passed on the committed continuation slice. Critic approval: agent://30-CriticG001Delta.
e2eCommands: uv run --no-project --with pytest --with pyflakes --with 'mcp>=1.2.0' --with 'python-hwpx>=2.24,<3' env PYTHONPATH=. python3 -m pytest -q
redTeamCommands: uv run --no-project --with pyflakes env PYTHONPATH=. python3 -m pyflakes hangeul_core hangeul_mcp tests scripts/windows_live_regression_harness.py

python3 -m json.tool docs/prd.json > /dev/null && python3 -m json.tool docs/evidence/safe-full-editor-continuation-g001-verification.json > /dev/null && python3 -m json.tool docs/evidence/safe-full-editor-continuation-g001-quality-gate.json > /dev/null && python3 -m json.tool docs/evidence/windows-live-regression-template.json > /dev/null

python3 - <<'PY'
import asyncio
from hangeul_mcp import server
print(len(asyncio.run(server.mcp.list_tools())))
PY

artifactRefs.description: Full pytest, pyflakes, JSON validation, MCP discovery, and CLI smoke evidence for the continuation slice

contractCoverage.obligation: The continuation slice must preserve existing public contracts while adding OWN edit sessions, picker metadata, and honest Windows evidence scaffolds.

surfaceEvidence.invocation: full pytest + pyflakes + docs/evidence JSON validation + MCP discovery + CLI smoke

adversarialCases.scenario: The continuation slice interacts with existing form-fill, delegate, live, and docs drift surfaces across the repository.
adversarialCases.expectedBehavior: The full pytest suite stays green with only the pre-existing optional skip, proving no regression escaped the focused lane.

adversarialCases.scenario: Adding preview/apply/restore tools changes the registered FastMCP surface and docs drift guards.
adversarialCases.expectedBehavior: Runtime MCP discovery reports 51 tools and maintainability guards stay green.

adversarialCases.scenario: The Linux session can verify code, docs, and harness scaffolds but cannot capture literal Windows/Hangul write-safe proof.
adversarialCases.expectedBehavior: Docs and evidence keep desktop proof pending and do not simulate or overclaim it.

iteration.evidence: Architect and critic blockers were resolved before commit, the final committed slice was rerun through the full repository gate cleanly, and the Windows evidence boundary remains explicitly pending rather than papered over.
rerunCommands: uv run --no-project --with pytest --with pyflakes --with 'mcp>=1.2.0' --with 'python-hwpx>=2.24,<3' env PYTHONPATH=. python3 -m pytest -q
uv run --no-project --with pyflakes env PYTHONPATH=. python3 -m pyflakes hangeul_core hangeul_mcp tests scripts/windows_live_regression_harness.py

python3 -m json.tool docs/prd.json > /dev/null && python3 -m json.tool docs/evidence/safe-full-editor-continuation-g001-verification.json > /dev/null && python3 -m json.tool docs/evidence/safe-full-editor-continuation-g001-quality-gate.json > /dev/null && python3 -m json.tool docs/evidence/windows-live-regression-template.json > /dev/null

python3 - <<'PY'
import asyncio

print(len(asyncio.run(server.mcp.list_tools())))
